prompt.name: Coherence Coach Track — S7.4 Phase 7 集成 + 冻结
prompt.sub_stage_name: Phase 7 管线集成 + MRT 布线 + 三诊断/四门禁接入 + 全量回归 + 合约冻结 + 状态更新
prompt.role: 你是 Coherence Coach Track S7.4 实现者。 你的任务是：将 S7.1-S7.3 的所有组件（MRT 框架 + 三诊断引擎 + 四门禁检查器） 集成到 CoachAgent 和审计管线中，完成全量回归测试、Phase 7 合约冻结和全局状态更新。 这是 Phase 7 的收尾子阶段。
prompt.context:
已完成的子阶段： - S7.1: src/coach/mrt.py — MRT 微随机实验框架（MRTExperiment + BayesianEstimator） - S7.1: contracts/causal_governance.json — MRT + 三诊断合约（status=draft） - S7.2: src/coach/diagnostics.py — 三诊断引擎（BalanceCheck + NegativeControlCheck + PlaceboWindowCheck + DiagnosticEngine） - S7.3: src/coach/gates_v18_7.py — 四门禁检查器（V18GatesAuditor + 4 Gates）
Phase 7 完整管线： ``` CoachAgent.act() [Phase 7 新增部分] │ ├── [S7.1] MRT 微随机实验分配 │ ├── MRTExperiment.assign(action_type, trace_id) │ ├── if is_variant → variant_id + delta 注入 DSL packet │ └── BayesianEstimator 在后端运行因果效应估计 │ ├── [S7.2] 三诊断（升档前强制检查） │ ├── DiagnosticEngine.run() │ ├── BalanceCheck.evaluate() │ ├── NegativeControlCheck.evaluate() │ └── PlaceboWindowCheck.evaluate() │ └── [S7.3] 四门禁审计 ├── V18GatesAuditor.audit() ├── VerificationLoadGate ├── SerendipityGate ├── TrespassingGate └── ManipulationGate ```
已有 gate 5 (causal_gate) 在 contracts/gates.json 中定义为： ``` "5_causal_gate": { "metric": "causal_diagnostics_triple", "rule": "平衡性检验 + 负对照 + 安慰剂窗口 全部通过" } ```
集成原则： - MRT 默认 OFF（mrt.enabled=false），不影响已有 act() 行为 - 三诊断默认 OFF，通过 diagnostics.enabled 控制 - 四门禁作为审计只读检查器独立运行，不嵌入 act() 运行时 - 不修改 Phase 6 的 MAPE-K 循环代码
prompt.task: 1) 将 MRT 框架集成到 CoachAgent（受 config mrt.enabled 控制） 2) 将三诊断引擎集成到 CoachAgent（gate 5 升档检查） 3) 将四门禁作为独立审计器，不嵌入 act() 运行时 4) 合约冻结：contracts/causal_governance.json status=draft → frozen 5) 全量回归：python -m pytest tests/ -q 全部 pass 6) 更新 reports/coach_global_state.json Phase 7 → GO 7) 输出 Phase 7 完结摘要报告

implementation_steps.step:
修改 src/coach/agent.py，在 act() 中增加 MRT 变体分配（受 config mrt.enabled 控制）：
```python class CoachAgent: def __init__(self, config: dict | None = None): # ... 已有初始化（含 Phase 6 MAPE-K 组件）...
# ── S7.1: MRT 微随机实验 ── self._mrt = None
def _ensure_mrt(self): """延迟加载 MRT 实验框架。""" mrt_cfg = self._config.get("mrt", {}) if not mrt_cfg.get("enabled", False): return if self._mrt is None: from src.coach.mrt import MRTConfig, MRTExperiment cfg = MRTConfig.from_dict(mrt_cfg) self._mrt = MRTExperiment(config=cfg)
def act(self, user_input: str, context: dict | None = None) -> dict: """CEO 入口：宏观判断 → MAPE-K（可选）→ MRT（可选）→ Manager → 返回。
Returns: dict (DSL action packet with execution metadata) """ ctx = context or {} mapek_enabled = self._config.get("mapek", {}).get("enabled", False) mrt_enabled = self._config.get("mrt", {}).get("enabled", False)
# ── 1. CEO 宏观判断 ── ceo_strategy = self._ceo_judge(user_input, ctx)
# ── 2. MAPE-K 循环（Phase 6 已有，不变）─ # ... (existing Phase 6 MAPE-K code, unchanged) ...
# ── 3. Manager 层：动作选择 + Handler 路由 ── packet = self._composer.compose(ceo_strategy, ctx)
# ── 4. MRT 变体分配（可选） ─ if mrt_enabled: self._ensure_mrt() assignment = self._mrt.assign( action_type=packet.get("action_type", ""), trace_id=packet.get("trace_id"), ) if assignment.is_variant: # 注入变体信息到 DSL packet packet["mrt_variant"] = { "variant_id": assignment.variant_id, "variant_name": assignment.variant_name, "delta": assignment.delta, "dimension": assignment.dimension, } packet["payload"]["style_delta"] = assignment.delta packet["mrt_assignment"] = assignment.to_dict()
# ── 5. Execute: 分发（MAPE-K 可选）─ if mapek_enabled: # ... (existing Phase 6 code, unchanged) ...
# ── 6. Coach 元信息 ── packet["coach_meta"] = { "ceo_strategy": ceo_strategy.get("macro_strategy"), "ttm_stage": ceo_strategy.get("ttm_stage"), "mapek_enabled": mapek_enabled, "mrt_enabled": mrt_enabled, "phase6_integrated": mapek_enabled, # 动态：MAPE-K 启用时为 True "phase7_integrated": mrt_enabled, # 动态：MRT 启用时为 True } return packet ```
关键 MRT 集成原则： - MRT 变体分配在 Manager 层 compose() 之后、Execute 分发之前 - MRT 只修改 packet 中的 style_delta 字段，不修改 action_type - mrt_assignment 始终写入 packet（即使未分配变体），供审计使用 - phase7_integrated 字段动态反映 MRT 是否启用

step.name: 三诊断集成（审计级，非运行时）

implementation_steps.step:
三诊断作为 audit 工具，不嵌入 CoachAgent.act() 运行时。 在三诊断获取调用数据时，从 CoachAgent 的运行时状态读取。
在 CoachAgent 中添加诊断接口方法：
```python class CoachAgent: def run_diagnostics( self, treatment_covariates: list[dict] | None = None, control_covariates: list[dict] | None = None, sham_successes: int = 0, sham_total: int = 0, control_successes: int = 0, control_total: int = 0, pre_period_successes: int = 0, pre_period_total: int = 0, ) -> dict: """运行三诊断。返回 DiagnosticsReport 的 dict 格式。
用于 gate 5 (causal_gate) 的升档前检查。 """ if not self._config.get("diagnostics", {}).get("enabled", False): return {"all_passed": True, "note": "diagnostics disabled, skipping"}
from src.coach.diagnostics import DiagnosticEngine diag_cfg = self._config.get("diagnostics", {}) engine = DiagnosticEngine( smd_threshold=diag_cfg.get("balance_check", {}).get("smd_threshold", 0.25), overlap_threshold=diag_cfg.get("negative_control", {}).get( "overlap_threshold", 0.8), placebo_window_hours=diag_cfg.get("placebo_window", {}).get( "window_hours_before", 2.0), min_control_events=diag_cfg.get("negative_control", {}).get( "min_control_events", 5), ) report = engine.run( treatment_covariates=treatment_covariates or [], control_covariates=control_covariates or [], sham_successes=sham_successes, sham_total=sham_total, control_successes=control_successes, control_total=control_total, pre_period_successes=pre_period_successes, pre_period_total=pre_period_total, ) return report.to_dict()
def audit_v18_7_gates( self, verification_seconds: float = 0.0, autonomous_seconds: float = 0.0, exploratory_actions: int = 0, total_excursions: int = 0, circuit_breaker_triggered: int = 0, leakage_after_trigger: int = 0, choice_distributions: list[dict] | None = None, ) -> dict: """运行 V18.7 四门禁审计。返回 GatesReport 的 dict 格式。""" from src.coach.gates_v18_7 import V18GatesAuditor auditor = V18GatesAuditor() report = auditor.audit( verification_seconds=verification_seconds, autonomous_seconds=autonomous_seconds, exploratory_actions=exploratory_actions, total_excursions=total_excursions, circuit_breaker_triggered=circuit_breaker_triggered, leakage_after_trigger=leakage_after_trigger, choice_distributions=choice_distributions or [], ) return report.to_dict() ```
关键设计决策： - run_diagnostics() 是显式调用方法，不嵌入 act() 自动流 - audit_v18_7_gates() 类似——需要外部提供数据（读自有状态或参数传入） - 数据源来自各已有组件（CoachAgent 计时、excursion 记录等）

``` # 标记 causal_governance.json → frozen contracts/causal_governance.json: - "status": "draft" → "status": "frozen" - "frozen_at": null → "frozen_at": "" - 不修改任何已有字段
# 标记 config/coach_defaults.yaml - 确认 Phase 7 配置段已追加 - 不修改任何已有配置值 ```

执行： ```bash cd D:/Claudedaoy/coherence && python -m pytest tests/ -q ```
期望：990+ 已有测试全部 pass + Phase 7 新增测试全部 pass。 如果失败，定位失败测试并修复，直到全绿。

更新 reports/coach_global_state.json，追加 Phase 7 状态：
```json { "coach_track": "COACH", "coach_phase": 7, "coach_sub_stage": "S7.4", "coach_stages": { "Phase 0-5": {"status": "GO", "tests": 916}, "S6.1": {"status": "GO", "name": "MAPE-K Contract", "tests": 0}, "S6.2": {"status": "GO", "name": "Monitor + Analyze", "tests": 12}, "S6.3": {"status": "GO", "name": "Plan + Execute", "tests": 14}, "S6.4": {"status": "GO", "name": "Knowledge Warehouse", "tests": 8}, "S6.5": {"status": "GO", "name": "Vector Memory Upgrade", "tests": 13}, "S6.6": {"status": "GO", "name": "Multi-Agent Layering", "tests": 11}, "S6.7": {"status": "GO", "name": "Phase 6 Close", "tests": 975}, "S7.1": {"status": "GO", "name": "MRT Framework", "tests": 0}, "S7.2": {"status": "GO", "name": "Three Diagnostics", "tests": 0}, "S7.3": {"status": "GO", "name": "V18.7 Four Gates", "tests": 0}, "S7.4": {"status": "GO", "name": "Phase 7 Close", "tests": 0} }, "coach_final_decision": "GO", "coach_test_totals": { "phase0_to_5": 916, "phase6_added": 59, "phase7_added": "<子阶段测试数之和>", "total": 990 }, "coach_updated_at_utc": "" } ```
注意保持现有 global_state.json 中之前 phase 的字段完整。 S7.1-S7.3 的 tests 数填入实际新增数。 更新 coach_phase=7, coach_sub_stage="S7.4"。

输出到控制台或 reports/phase7_completion.md 的摘要：
``` ════════════════════════════════════════ Phase 7 — 完结报告 ════════════════════════════════════════
子阶段: [GO] S7.1 — MRT 微随机实验框架 [GO] S7.2 — 三诊断引擎 [GO] S7.3 — V18.7 四门禁 [GO] S7.4 — 集成 + 冻结
合约: contracts/causal_governance.json → FROZEN v1.0.0
代码: src/coach/mrt.py → MRTExperiment + BayesianEstimator src/coach/diagnostics.py → 三诊断引擎（平衡性/负对照/安慰剂） src/coach/gates_v18_7.py → 四门禁审计器 src/coach/agent.py → MRT 布线 + 诊断/审计接口
测试: 新增 测试 → 全部 pass 已有 990 测试 → 零回归
状态: PHASE 7 GO ✅ ```

file_change_summary.change: +60 行: MRT 集成 + 三诊断接口 + 四门禁接口
2 行: status draft → frozen, frozen_at 填充
确认 Phase 7 配置段完整

prompt.success_criteria: 1. src/coach/agent.py 中 MRT 通过 config mrt.enabled 控制，默认 OFF 2. MRT 启用时：action_type 不变，style_delta 注入 payload 3. mrt_assignment 始终写入 act() 返回字典 4. CoachAgent.run_diagnostics() 存在，返回 DiagnosticsReport dict 5. CoachAgent.audit_v18_7_gates() 存在，返回 GatesReport dict 6. 三诊断和四门禁不嵌入 act() 自动流，需显式调用 7. contracts/causal_governance.json status="frozen" + frozen_at 非空 8. Phase 6 MAPE-K 代码未修改 9. 全量回归：Phase 7 新增 + 已有 990 全部 pass 10. reports/coach_global_state.json Phase 7 → GO 11. 现有 act() 接口签名未改变 12. 被 config 禁用的行为与之前完全一致（零行为漂移）
